rituals.name: Astromancy
rituals.summary: Learn information such as Skills, Desires, and Convictions about a target person. Knowing their correct birth or Embrace date adds 1 die to the Ritual pool.

rituals.name: Beelzebeatit
rituals.summary: Make a small area repellent to animals, vermin, plants, and other lesser living creatures. Directed or controlled creatures are not prevented from entering.
rituals.ingredients: Vinegar or alcohol

rituals.name: Bind the Accusing Tongue
rituals.summary: Prevent the target from communicating anything negative about the caster. The victim can break free by rolling Composure + Resolve.

rituals.name: Blood Apocrypha
rituals.summary: Embed messages into blood or vessels. The first person receives the message if they are the intended recipient or if they possess A Taste for Blood.

rituals.name: Blood Missive
rituals.summary: Send messages through blood. The first person to taste the blood receives the message as if it were intended for them, or if they possess A Taste for Blood.
rituals.ingredients: The caster's blood

rituals.name: Blood to Water
rituals.summary: Turn blood into water, removing all traces of blood.

rituals.name: Blood Walk
rituals.summary: Use blood to learn about a subject's generation, name, sire, and — on a crit — any active Blood Bonds. Requires one Rouse Check from the subject.
rituals.ingredients: Blood of the subject

rituals.name: Bloody Message
rituals.summary: Write a blood message onto a remembered reflective surface for a chosen type of viewer. Make the Ritual Roll when enchanting the surface.
rituals.ingredients: A mirror, human blood, and UV light

rituals.name: Clinging of the Insect
rituals.summary: Drink blood mixed with a freshly crushed spider to cling to walls like an insect. The user must cling with both hands and feet.
rituals.ingredients: Living spider, your own blood

rituals.name: Coax the Garden
rituals.summary: Animate nearby plant life to hinder and harm anyone in the ritual area except the caster.
rituals.ingredients: Human blood and poppy seeds

rituals.name: Craft Bloodstone
rituals.summary: Slowly soak blood into a small magnet. Once done, sense the direction and rough distance of the stone for a week. A caster may have up to as many stones as their Resolve.
rituals.ingredients: Small magnet, your blood

rituals.name: Douse the Fear
rituals.summary: Briefly steady yourself against fire, gaining a bonus to resist terror frenzy from flames. The power wears off once the scene ends.
rituals.ingredients: A holy object exposed to flame

rituals.name: Enrich the Blood
rituals.summary: Make a human vessel's blood richer so a smaller drink slakes more Hunger for a short time. Does not work on Kindred vitae.
rituals.ingredients: A vial of the target's blood and fresh human blood

rituals.name: Herd Ward (Minor)
rituals.summary: Ward a single member of a herd to prevent unauthorized feeding. Make the Ritual Roll when someone else tries to feed from them.

rituals.name: Letter Ward
rituals.summary: Seal a letter so anyone except the intended recipient is burned and the message is destroyed. Make the Ritual Roll if anyone other than the recipient opens it.
rituals.ingredients: Pigeon blood, wax, and dog blood

rituals.name: Revealing the Crimson Trail
rituals.summary: Reveal traces of spilled blood at the caster's current location. Very old traces require a Resolve + Awareness test.

rituals.name: Sanguine Tidings
rituals.summary: Make a message appear on a mirror when a specific type of person comes nearby. The message disappears once read.

rituals.name: Seal the Brand
rituals.summary: Make a tattoo, scar, brand, or similar body modification permanent on vampiric flesh. The process inflicts 1 Superficial damage.
rituals.ingredients: Molten silver poured over the body modification

rituals.name: Shared Memory
rituals.summary: Observe another's In Memoriam. Participants can observe events and offer advice but cannot directly influence them.

rituals.name: Wake with Evening's Freshness
rituals.summary: When threatened during the day after performing this ritual, awaken and ignore daytime penalties for a scene. Do not make the Ritual Roll until true danger appears.
rituals.ingredients: Burnt bones of a rooster

rituals.name: Ward Against Ghouls
rituals.summary: Place a ward on a small object. When a ghoul tries to touch it, make the Ritual Roll — on a success, the ghoul cannot touch it and is damaged. Uses standard rules for Wards.

rituals.name: As Fog on Water
rituals.summary: Walk silently across the surface of a body of water for the rest of the night. Can be ended early.
rituals.ingredients: A piece of wood from a ship and water

rituals.name: Calix Secretus
rituals.summary: Store your vitae inside a small object and release it later with a command word. Two Rouse Checks stored will slake one Hunger.
rituals.ingredients: A hand-sized object and the caster's blood

rituals.name: Calling the Aura's Remnants
rituals.summary: Speak with the residual aura of someone who has died. The aura retains memories only up to the time of death.

rituals.name: Communicate with Kindred Sire
rituals.summary: Create a long-distance telepathic link between Sire and Childe. A major disturbance on either side breaks the connection.

rituals.name: Craftmaster
rituals.summary: Temporarily gain dots and a specialty in Academics, Craft, Performance, or Science. Dots replace existing dots in that skill, but grant an extra die if the caster already has the specialty. On a total failure, the caster takes Aggravated Damage.

rituals.name: Depths of Nightmare
rituals.summary: Curse someone with nightmares that cause Willpower damage which cannot be healed during the Ritual's duration. On a total failure, the victim has pleasant dreams and is pointed toward the caster.

rituals.name: Elemental Grasp
rituals.summary: Command your chosen element to interfere with a target. The target takes Superficial Health damage and must roll to continue. Gain +1 die to the Ritual pool if the element is already naturally active.

rituals.name: Enhance Dyscrasia
rituals.summary: Amplify a vessel's Dyscrasia so several Kindred can benefit from it over three nights.
rituals.ingredients: A resonant personal object belonging to the target

rituals.name: Eyes of Babel
rituals.summary: Consume the eyes and tongue of a victim to gain the ability to read and speak any language known by them. This Ritual may incur Stains.
rituals.ingredients: The victim's eyes and tongue

rituals.name: Illuminate Trail of Prey
rituals.summary: Follow the trail of a specific person. The victim's face must be known to the caster.

rituals.name: Le Sang de l'Amour
rituals.summary: Create a mystical connection between two people who desire each other at the time of casting. Both can use Resolve + Awareness to estimate where the other is. On a total failure of the Ritual, the roll disorients them and temporarily reduces Composure by one.

rituals.name: Shroud of Silence
rituals.summary: Seal a room so no sound can escape until the focus is removed or the scene ends. Requires vitae from a Kindred who possesses Obfuscate.
rituals.ingredients: Woven cloth, a golden ring, and vitae from an Obfuscate user

rituals.name: Silentia Mortis
rituals.summary: Replicate Silence of Death (Obfuscate ●), creating a radius of silence. If cast on someone other than the caster, they must also make a Rouse Check.

rituals.name: Soporific Touch
rituals.summary: Turn your vitae into a touch-activated narcotic that weakens the victim's resistance to mundane manipulation or mind-altering Disciplines. The Ritual Roll is contested against the victim's Stamina + Resolve.
rituals.ingredients: Hashish or another narcotic substance

rituals.name: Stolen Memory
rituals.summary: Access your sire's memories. Can reach grandsire or beyond with a Difficulty increase of 2 per generation past the sire.

rituals.name: Tiamat Glistens
rituals.summary: Attune yourself to a place of power (Furcus), gaining bonuses to Rituals cast there. Only one caster can be attuned at a time; if another performs the Ritual, the original caster immediately loses their bonus.

rituals.name: Truth of Blood
rituals.summary: Discern truth from lies in a target's speech. The target resists with Composure + Occult. Cannot get past memory-wiping Disciplines.

rituals.name: Unseen Underground
rituals.summary: Become invisible while underground. Immediately ends if the caster goes above ground or takes hostile actions; otherwise lasts one hour.

rituals.name: Viscera Garden
rituals.summary: Grow Blood-addicted plants that can consume corpses. Kindred can eat them without slaking Hunger but they stay down. Mortals who ingest a plant become more susceptible to Disciplines.

rituals.name: Ward against Spirits
rituals.summary: Protect a small object against spirits. Uses standard rules for Wards.

rituals.name: Warding Circle against Ghouls
rituals.summary: Protect an area against Ghouls. Uses standard rules for Wards.

rituals.name: Web of Hunger
rituals.summary: Avoid the pull of the Beckoning. Normally a 4th level Ritual, but reduced to 2nd level when used with the required dagger.
rituals.ingredients: A special dagger

rituals.name: Bladed Hands
rituals.summary: Sharpen the caster's hands into weapons. Treated as a light piercing Brawl weapon with a +2 modifier.

rituals.name: Blood Sigil
rituals.summary: Create a tattoo on a Kindred that also contains a hidden message. Read it with a Resolve + Occult roll or Sense the Unseen (Auspex ●). The caster can remove it by spending Willpower and touching the tattoo.

rituals.name: Bloodless Feast
rituals.summary: Transmute an unconscious human's life into clear vitae that can sate Hunger. Those who consume enough of it become weaker to diablerie. May incur Stains.
rituals.ingredients: An unconscious human and a flawless crystal chalice

rituals.name: Communal Vigor
rituals.summary: Strengthen a pack's Vaulderie so members share the priest's Blood Potency for the night. The Priest gains +3 bonus dice on Dominate and Presence tests against packmates.
rituals.ingredients: A fingernail from the pack priest

rituals.name: Dagon's Call
rituals.summary: Rupture the blood vessels of a victim from afar. Can be used up to two additional times the same night, each costing another Rouse Check. Opposed by Stamina + Resolve.

rituals.name: Deflection of Wooden Doom
rituals.summary: Protect yourself from being staked. Do not make the Ritual Roll until actually staked.

rituals.name: Elemental Shelter
rituals.summary: Meld with your chosen element, similar to Earth Meld (Protean ●●●). Fire Kolduns must resist terror frenzy before casting. The caster's form can be detected with Wits + Awareness or Sense the Unseen. If the bonded element is removed, the Koldun enters torpor.

rituals.name: Essence of Air
rituals.summary: Allows for flight. The Camarilla frowns upon this Ritual due to its Masquerade dangers.

rituals.name: Eyes of the Past
rituals.summary: See what happened at the caster's current location in the past. Only holds events within the last five years.

rituals.name: Fire in the Blood
rituals.summary: Burn a target's blood from afar, causing painful Superficial damage and physical penalties. A victim can only be affected by this Ritual once per night.
rituals.ingredients: Target's blood, their image, and a red candle or iron lighter

rituals.name: Firewalker
rituals.summary: Allow yourself and your comrades to become resistant to fire. The required fingertip removal must all come from the caster, even when cast on others.
rituals.ingredients: The caster's fingertips

rituals.name: Galvanic Ruination
rituals.summary: Destroy nearby electrical systems, knocking out lights, alarms, cars, and cameras in a warehouse or three-story building. Extend to additional buildings by increasing Difficulty by 1 per building.
rituals.ingredients: A copper coin smeared with the caster's blood

rituals.name: Gentle Mind
rituals.summary: Protect the mind of a target against Frenzy. The caster must share blood with the target and cannot cast this on themselves.

rituals.name: Grim Chrysalis
rituals.summary: Spit out a protective cocoon that shields from sunlight and accelerates healing or reshaping. The cocoon is hard and provides some protection from outside damage.
rituals.ingredients: Human hair and a moth or butterfly

rituals.name: Haunted House
rituals.summary: Make a haven appear as if it's haunted. The effects last for 10 years.

rituals.name: Herd Ward (Major)
rituals.summary: Ward a door to protect multiple herd members within against unauthorized feeding. Make the Ritual Roll when someone else tries to feed from the herd.
rituals.ingredients: Scorpion poison and the caster's vitae

rituals.name: Illusion of Peaceful Death
rituals.summary: Make a corpse appear as if it died a natural death. The body must have at least half of its blood remaining to succeed.

rituals.name: Illusion of Perfection
rituals.summary: Become a nondescript, unremarkable person to blend into crowds, similar to Mask of a Thousand Faces (Obfuscate).

rituals.name: Nepenthe
rituals.summary: Create a draught that removes Stains, but prolonged use makes those Stains permanent. Using Nepenthe two sessions in a row causes one Stain to become permanent (cumulative).

rituals.name: One with the Blade
rituals.summary: Dedicate a melee weapon to yourself so it resists decay and can be anointed for combat. Only one weapon can hold this ritual at a time.
rituals.ingredients: A melee weapon immersed in the caster's vitae

rituals.name: Sanguine Watcher
rituals.summary: Create a small rat from vitae that can observe or steal on the caster's behalf. Instructions must be very explicit.

rituals.name: Seeing with the Sky's Eyes
rituals.summary: Observe a target from above. Ask one question about their location and surroundings per success. Critical Wins grant 3 extra questions and can reveal Ambitions, Desires, Convictions, and Humanity.

rituals.name: Seeking Tiamat
rituals.summary: Find veins of the Earth (Furcae). Costs one Rouse Check and Aggravated Health damage. Critical Wins discover the closest vein and point toward 2 Furcae on that vein.

rituals.name: Sleep of Judas
rituals.summary: Prepare a supernatural narcotic that can incapacitate vampires and kill mortals or ghouls. Make the Ritual Roll when the target is drugged.
rituals.ingredients: Blood from a mystical landmark and opium

rituals.name: Soul of the Hemonculus
rituals.summary: Create a Hemonculus — a shrivelled, smaller, weaker version of the caster who must obey every command. Immune to sunlight but cannot be Embraced, made into a ghoul, or Blood Bonded. Kindred slake no Hunger from drinking its blood.

rituals.name: Stone of the True Form
rituals.summary: Dispel illusions and Discipline-altered creatures. Must throw the stone with Dexterity + Athletics. On a win: illusions dispelled, shapeshifters painfully returned to original form, Discipline-made beings separated into components. Target resists with Resolve + Occult.

rituals.name: The Unseen Change
rituals.summary: Force Lupines entering the area into Wolf Form. They resist with a contested Willpower roll; on failure they enter Lupus Form instead.

rituals.name: Trespass
rituals.summary: Flow through any crevice that blood can fit through to move through a building undetected. Unlike Incorporeal Passage, the caster can be attacked if noticed.

rituals.name: Viral Haruspex
rituals.summary: Gather information from everyone in an area suffering from a certain disease. The caster must drink from someone infected with that disease within 24 hours before casting.
rituals.ingredients: Blood of someone infected with the target disease

rituals.name: Ward against Lupines
rituals.summary: Protect a small object against Werewolves. Uses standard rules for Wards.

rituals.name: Warding Circle against Spirits
rituals.summary: Protect an area against spirits. Uses standard rules for Wards.

rituals.name: Balm of Bathory
rituals.summary: Brew a blood balm from young mortal blood that temporarily grants the Stunning (••••) Merit. Each subsequent use requires double the mortal blood of the last batch.
rituals.ingredients: Caster vitae, youthful mortal blood, chamomile, and fat or butter

rituals.name: Compel the Inanimate
rituals.summary: Give a simple command to an inanimate object that it follows a few minutes later. The caster must remain in the same general area. Detectable with Sense the Unseen (Auspex ●) via a contested roll.

rituals.name: Defense of the Sacred Haven
rituals.summary: Protect a haven with mystical darkness from sunlight. The Ritual Roll is made once the sun rises.

rituals.name: Egregore Consultation
rituals.summary: By hosting an illness, access the collective experiences of everyone in the area with that illness to enhance Skills. Skills very common locally can grant up to +2 extra dice.

rituals.name: Eyes of the Nighthawk
rituals.summary: Take control of a carnivorous bird and act through them. The caster can use most non-physical Disciplines through the bird.

rituals.name: Feast of Ashes
rituals.summary: Curse a vampire so they vomit blood for a night and can only sate Hunger with ashes (minimum Hunger 3). Contested against the victim's Resolve + Willpower.
rituals.ingredients: A parchment bearing the target's name, burned to ash

rituals.name: Guided Memory
rituals.summary: Drink a willing Kindred's prepared vitae to relive their memories guided by them. Can be used to unlock Discipline powers, Merits, and other gifts.
rituals.ingredients: Another vampire's vitae, dried rosemary, and poppies or forget-me-nots

rituals.name: Incorporeal Passage
rituals.summary: The caster's form becomes ghost-like, allowing them to pass through solid matter. They may only interact with the world through speech and sight.

rituals.name: Innocence of the Child's Heart
rituals.summary: Block Scry the Soul (Auspex) to hide evidence of diablerie and other vampiric traits. Extremely rare — only learned by obtaining Nicolai's notes or by Storyteller discretion.

rituals.name: Innocence's Veil
rituals.summary: Temporarily make traces of Diablerie undetectable. Cannot be detected by A Taste for Blood or Scry the Soul.

rituals.name: Invisible Chains of Binding
rituals.summary: Prepare a chain link that can pin a target in place for one hour per success in the margin and hinder their physical defenses. Ends if the chain is destroyed or removed.
rituals.ingredients: A chain link inscribed with the caster's blood

rituals.name: Land's Sustenance
rituals.summary: Feed from a place of power, turning it into a place of suffering where injuries are more severe. Lasts until end of the Story. Once per session, automatically pass Rouse Checks equal to the Ritual margin.

rituals.name: Protean Curse
rituals.summary: Transform a target into a bat, similar to Metamorphosis (Protean). Cannot be used on the caster.

rituals.name: Rending the Sweet Earth
rituals.summary: Pull a vampire from the earth who is using Earth Meld (Protean). Automatically awakens the target unless they are in torpor or the Ritual Roll is a Critical Win.

rituals.name: Riding the Earth's Vein
rituals.summary: Travel from one Furcus to a random other. The caster has no control over the destination. One-way; only activates where first cast.

rituals.name: Seek the Gathered Vitae
rituals.summary: Sense a concentration of Kindred vitae with a collective Blood Potency of 13 or higher and track its direction for an hour. Ghouls count as 1/4 and Duskborn as 1/2.
rituals.ingredients: Red ink, pomegranate juice, white paper or cloth, and a large top

rituals.name: Ward against Cainites
rituals.summary: Protect a small object against Kindred. Uses standard rules for Wards. A vampire examining the ward may read the caster's name with an Intelligence + Auspex vs. Intelligence + Blood Sorcery roll.

rituals.name: Warding Circle against Lupines
rituals.summary: Protect an area against Werewolves. Uses standard rules for Wards.

rituals.name: Antebrachia Ignium
rituals.summary: Coat your arms in vitae that catches fire, letting you wield flame by touch for a scene. The caster is only resistant to fire on their arms.
rituals.ingredients: Enough vitae to coat both arms and a source of flame

rituals.name: Atrocity's Release
rituals.summary: Reverse the effects of Diablerie. Can be resisted with a Resolve + Blood Sorcery test.

rituals.name: Dominion
rituals.summary: Claim a building as your domain, blocking others from using Animalism, Auspex, Dominate, or Presence there. The area of effect is determined by the number of Rouse Checks spent.
rituals.ingredients: Iron seals embedded over every doorway

rituals.name: Eden's Bounty
rituals.summary: Draw blood from nearby mortals through a tree to reduce the caster's Hunger. Mortals suffer −1 die to Physical rolls and 1 Aggravated health damage for the remainder of the chapter. May incur Stains.
rituals.ingredients: A corpse, a living tree, a fresh apple, and a rotten apple

rituals.name: Elemental Attack
rituals.summary: Command your chosen element to attack a foe. Can be a Chain Ritual. Gain +1 die if the element is naturally active. Chained with Elemental Grasp and Tiamat Glistens, becomes a natural disaster (tornado, magma flow, tsunami, etc.).

rituals.name: Escape to True Sanctuary
rituals.summary: Create a one-way portal between two ritual circles. Requires 12 Rouse Checks total. A caster may only have one set of circles active at a time.

rituals.name: Fisher King
rituals.summary: Become one with your land, gaining access to its secrets. Can be a Chain Ritual. Use Wits + Streetwise or Survival to ask questions about the land; gain one extra question per session. Lasts until end of the story. Chained with Land's Sustenance and Compel the Inanimate, casters gain complete control and can heal 5 Aggravated damage total each night.

rituals.name: Heart of Stone
rituals.summary: Turn your heart to stone, preventing staking. Causes emotional detachment, penalizing Remorse rolls and active Social-related rolls. Cannot use Presence during the Ritual's duration, but gain a bonus when resisting its use on you.

rituals.name: Reawakened Vigor
rituals.summary: Regain Blood Potency faster after extended torpor. Inflicts Aggravated damage on anyone other than the caster.

rituals.name: Shaft of Belated Dissolution
rituals.summary: Create a stake that seeks out a vampire's heart. Even if the initial attack misses the heart, a splinter breaks off and moves toward it — if it finds the heart, the target faces Final Death.
rituals.ingredients: A wooden stake

rituals.name: Simulacrum Gate
rituals.summary: Build a sacrificial replica doorway that allows multiple vampires to cross vast distances. May incur Stains.
rituals.ingredients: Replica materials, mortal sacrifices, and a vampire sacrifice

rituals.name: Transferring the Soul
rituals.summary: Take over a new body through the act of diablerie. Requires another Kindred with Oblivion ●●●●●, or a single Kindred possessing both Blood Sorcery ●●●●● and Oblivion ●●●●●.
rituals.dice_pool: Intelligence + Blood Sorcery and Intelligence + Oblivion

rituals.name: Warding Circle against Cainites
rituals.summary: Protect an area against Kindred. Uses standard rules for Wards.

ceremonies.name: Knowing Stone
ceremonies.summary: Identify the locations and existences of specific ghosts. The caster must know the ghost's name.
ceremonies.ingredients: A stone and the ghost's name

ceremonies.name: Summon Spirit
ceremonies.summary: Call a named wraith through the Shroud by using one of its fetters, without forcing it to obey.
ceremonies.ingredients: A wraith's fetter, your vitae, and an image, signature, or name of the wraith

ceremonies.name: The Gift of False Life
ceremonies.summary: Animate prepared corpses to carry out one simple command until they finish the task or are destroyed.
ceremonies.ingredients: One or more human bodies, plus a mixture of blood, phlegm, and bile

ceremonies.name: Traveler's Call
ceremonies.summary: Send a vision of your surroundings through Oblivion to call another Shalimite to you.
ceremonies.ingredients: The black book given during Shalimite indoctrination

ceremonies.name: Ashen Relic
ceremonies.summary: Preserve a Kindred's body against decay. Three successes in the margin preserves more completely.

ceremonies.name: Awaken the Homuncular Servant
ceremonies.summary: Create a loyal spy or stalker from a severed body part or small animal carcass.
ceremonies.ingredients: A body part or small carcass, the weapon used on it, and a foul bodily mixture

ceremonies.name: Blinding the Alloy Eye
ceremonies.summary: Bind a death-spirit to foil nearby cameras and surveillance for a scene.
ceremonies.ingredients: A small piece of aluminum mesh

ceremonies.name: Compel Spirit
ceremonies.summary: Force a nearby wraith into service for a limited task, with harsher demands possible on stronger wins.
ceremonies.ingredients: A wraith's fetter, your vitae, and leverage against the fetter

ceremonies.name: Maw of Ahriman
ceremonies.summary: Open a portal to the Abyss, usually within the caster's own mouth. The caster cannot speak until the portal is cancelled or the next sunrise.

ceremonies.name: Craft Flesh Golem
ceremonies.summary: Animate stitched corpse parts into a flesh golem that obeys its creator's commands.
ceremonies.ingredients: Corpse parts, sea-bed clay, acid-dissolved copper, and an engraving tool

ceremonies.name: Create Corpse Suit
ceremonies.summary: Sew a sentient skin garment that warns of danger but brings folklore weaknesses.
ceremonies.ingredients: Human skin, mortal fat, waxed thread, and decorative elements

ceremonies.name: Fortezza Sindonica
ceremonies.summary: Lay a chain ward that tortures and hinders wraiths crossing its boundary.
ceremonies.ingredients: Powdered bones, salt, steel chain, vitae, a finger, and a metal basin

ceremonies.name: Harrowhaunt
ceremonies.summary: Make a place radiate supernatural dread, driving mortals away and testing vampires for fear frenzy.
ceremonies.ingredients: Mortals subjected to terror and suffering in the place

ceremonies.name: Host Spirit
ceremonies.summary: Invite a wraith into your body, gaining physical strength and health while risking possession.
ceremonies.ingredients: A tribute for a wraith, a parasitic bug, and two of your teeth

ceremonies.name: Knit the Veil
ceremonies.summary: Thicken the Shroud in a marked area, blocking ghostly passage and spying while the candle burns.
ceremonies.ingredients: Ground bones, an iron needle, catgut, vitae, and a goat-tallow candle

ceremonies.name: Name of the Father
ceremonies.summary: Invoke Shalim to overwhelm a victim with sensory darkness and paralyzing despair.
ceremonies.ingredients: Ancient Greek speech, eye contact with the victim, and five charcoal sticks

ceremonies.name: Shallow Slumber
ceremonies.summary: Reduce time spent in torpor.

ceremonies.name: Shambling Hordes
ceremonies.summary: Raise several aggressive corpses that obey commands and attack others when left idle.
ceremonies.ingredients: Prepared corpses and a fresh human sacrifice

ceremonies.name: Wisdom of the Dead
ceremonies.summary: Gain information by speaking with a corpse skull or severed head. Add two dice to the pool if still carrying the skull or head for the rest of the night.
ceremonies.ingredients: A corpse skull or severed head

ceremonies.name: Befoul Vessel
ceremonies.summary: Infect a mortal's blood so any vampire feeding from them gains Hunger instead of slaking it.
ceremonies.ingredients: The vampire's saliva

ceremonies.name: Bind the Spirit
ceremonies.summary: Anchor a compelled wraith to a place or person, causing its strongest emotions to haunt the target.
ceremonies.ingredients: A wraith's fetter, your vitae, a human sacrifice, salt, and a link to the target

ceremonies.name: Bind to Mortal Form
ceremonies.summary: Chain a mortal's spirit to their aging body, extending life without making them a ghoul.
ceremonies.ingredients: A mortal, Oblivion-marked chain, human tallow candle, grave dirt, and body fluid

ceremonies.name: Death Rattle
ceremonies.summary: Force a target to experience a chosen wraith's death through a prepared link.
ceremonies.ingredients: A wraith's fetter, target keepsake, vitae, overproof rum, candle, and bowl

ceremonies.name: Split the Veil
ceremonies.summary: Tear open the boundary to the Shadowlands, making passage easier and allowing ghosts through if widened enough.
ceremonies.ingredients: A used scalpel, chalk or charcoal, silk, and a human sacrifice

ceremonies.name: Ex Nihilo
ceremonies.summary: Cross physically into the Shadowlands with companions, remaining there until you end the power or are destroyed.
ceremonies.ingredients: Masks, your vitae for each participant's feet, and two coins per traveler

ceremonies.name: Gift of True Life
ceremonies.summary: Move years of mortal life from one person to another, extending one life by shortening the other.
ceremonies.ingredients: Two mortals and a length of silk rope

ceremonies.name: Lazarene Blessing
ceremonies.summary: Offer a newly dead body as a vessel for a willing wraith, restoring it to a fragile imitation of life.
ceremonies.ingredients: A human sacrifice, incense, a mammal heart, and powdered silver

ceremonies.name: Pit of Contemplation
